title: Keeper Allay
description: (Fabric) The magical item collector (allay) waiting for you at your death place with your items, and goes far away after giving them to you.
body:
_Lore: Magical spirits that inhabit the unseen corners of the world, Legend says they sense the parting of a soul and rush to collect its possessions, hovering faithfully until the owner returns._ For the Bedrock Version: [Keeper Allay Bedrock](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft-bedrock/addons/keeper-allay) This Works on both Client (singleplayer) and Server, and servers dont need client mod at all. Instead of your items scattering on the ground when you die, a friendly Spirit Guardian appears to catch them all instantly. **🌟 Features** Secure Death loot... That Floats! Saves your entire inventory and armor instantly upon death. The Keeper is indestructible (immune to fire and explosions), ensuring your items are 100% safe. **Magical Tracking System** Lost your way? Death Coordinates appears in the chat, showing you the exact Location of your Allay. Works even if you die multiple times **Simple Retrieval** Just walk up to the Allay and interact (Right Click) to get everything back. **Beautiful Animations** The Spirit waits patiently at your death spot, looking at you when you arrive, completely vanilla animations. After returning your items, it peacefully drifts away into the sky. **Multiplayer Support**  Full Multiplayer Support with no player or allay limits. Lava and void death Allay won't come to void and lava to save your stuff, some things are impossible... even for spirits :) **How to Use** Play normally. If you die, don't panic! A Keeper Spirit (Allay) spawns exactly where you died, and hovers close to death point. Follow the Coordinates in your chat to find your way back. Interact with the Allay to reclaim your gear, it will fly away to never be seen again :)   **Installation:** Add the mod into the mods folder of your fabric instance, it also needs fabric api. Or use your preffered launcher.
 

If you want to support me and donate a small amount, please consider this one time patreon donation (no subscription or membership)
